events.title: Scene & Heard: DIY & Making Your Own Space
'Beetlejuice' the musical
events.venue: Carol and Frank Morsani Center for the Arts
events.description: The performance—opening at Straz Center next week—brings a different take to the original film. Lydia Deetz, originally played by Winona Ryder, takes the lead in the production as she mourns the death of her mother. The character of Beetlejuice also takes a lead role in the production opposed to the film only giving 20 minutes of screen time for the character. 352-593-0027

events.title: Funk N Ting: DJ Mike Blenda & DJ Shafiq
St. Pete Opera: 'La Bohéme'
events.description: Theater, Live Music

events.title: Heights Drive Thru 1 Year Anniversary BASH
Always Remember Andrew Joseph Jr: A Community Memorial Service
events.description: Deanna Joseph expects folks coming to The Portico on Saturday to share stories of a man who was larger than life, funny, and had an uncanny ability to make people believe they could imagine more than they imagined. (813) 222-2233

events.title: Second Saturday Art Walk
events.description: From 5 p.m.-9 p.m. on Saturday, Jan. 14, the St. Pete Arts Alliance has coordinated a trolley that will connect riders to 40 different venues in a handful of districts as part of its monthly Second Saturday Artwalk. Service starts at stop No. 1 located at 2955 Central Ave. in St. Petersburg.

events.title: End of the Rainbow- June 11-21, 2026
events.description: End of the Rainbow is a dramatic play with music that centers on the final months of Judy Garland's life, specifically her comeback attempt in London during Christmas 1968. It features a fabulous array of Judy Garland's hits sung live in the play. 727- 322-0316

events.title: Flower Lady
events.description: Flower Lady at Tampa Fringe Festival | In a world where your worth is measured by your productivity, one lady throws a wrench into the system with her - garden? Farmer-florist, Kali Rabaut of Blue House Florals, takes audience members on a journey through the weeds of her mind where she finds beauty in living with questions on productivity, identity, and occupation. None

events.title: Safety Harbor Ghost Tour — Haunted History & True Crime
events.description: Safety Harbor's only ghost tour since 2021. Led by certified guide and professional paranormal investigator Cynthia Dominick. Ninety minutes of documented true crime, local legends, and paranormal activity at historic landmarks. A hanging tree. A devastating fire. A murder. A bank robbery. Guests participate in a ghost hunting sampler using dowsing rods, spirit box, and the flashlight experiment. Since 2021, consistent unexplained activity has been documented at a specific location on this route before, during, and after every tour. No costumes. No actors. No scripted performances. Ages 13+ 7276861582

events.title: Double Play at 1983
events.description: Join us June 12th at 1983 for Double Play Days — a family-friendly happy hour experience designed for fun both inside the game room and out on the turf. Throughout the month, guests can enjoy an energetic atmosphere filled with interactive games, kid-friendly activities, great food, and entertainment perfect for all ages. Parents can unwind while kids explore the arcade, challenge friends on the turf, and enjoy a rotating lineup of games and themed experiences that make every visit feel new. 8132513130

events.title: St Pete Beach Seafood Festival
events.description: The St Pete Beach Seafood Festival takes place downtown St Pete Beach on bustling Corey Ave. Full of restaurants, bars and unique shoppes, we are filling the street with a weekend of bands, local crafters, great seafood, and fun. Don't miss the crab races! Free for patrons to attend. Make sure to follow for updates on the band schedules. June 12th | 5pm-10pm June 13th | 12pm-8pm June 14th | 10am-6pm Band schedule: Friday 6pm-10pm Motel Funk Saturday 1pm-3pm Bickley XI (Xtra Irie) - Steel Pan Band 4pm-5:30pm Memphis Lightning - High Energy Blues Rock 6:30pm-8pm The Petty Experience, Tom 727-674-1464

events.title: Daddy Daughter Dance
events.description: Join us June 12, 6–9 PM for our Daddy Daughter Dance! Music, treats, fun & memories. Tickets are limited. 7278218992

events.title: Evanescence 2026 World Tour With Spiritbox And Nova Twins
events.venue: MIDFLORIDA Credit Union Amphitheatre at the FL State Fairgrounds

events.title: Connor Wood
events.description: About the Artist: Connor Wood, known as @fibula across his socials, launched his comedy career online with relatable rants about life in quarantine as an unemployed person. Connor has since garnered tens of millions of likes across his videos, and co-hosts his podcast - Brooke and Connor Make a Podcast - with Brooke Averick. At the top of 2024, Connor announced his first ever ‘Fibs & Friends’ tour, which has since sold-out more than 100 shows both nationwide and overseas. BUY TICKETS Ticket Policy: The Funny Bone has a full bar and a dinner menu is available to every guest 813-864-4000

events.title: USA Soccer Watch Party Series: USA vs. Paraguay
events.description: The USA Soccer Watch Party Series kicks off Friday, June 12th at Al Lang Stadium — Tampa Bay's home for soccer! Presented by Michelob Ultra, the Tampa Bay Rowdies, the American Outlaws, and PMB Events, this patriotic powerhouse event brings thousands of passionate fans together to watch USA vs. Paraguay on a massive 20-foot LED screen in a true stadium atmosphere. Gates open at 7 PM with pre-game pep rallies, electric chants, goal celebrations, and the chance to win tickets to the World Cup match in Miami! This is a 21+ event.

events.title: The Saint of Scandal: The True(ish) Story of La Maupin @ Tampa Fringe X
events.description: Award-winning storyteller Samantha Martí-Parisi brings the outrageous true story of La Maupin to the Tampa International Fringe Festival with The Saint of Scandal: The True(ish) Story of La Maupin. Swordfights, the stage, seduction, rebellion, and scandal collide in this bold one-woman theatrical experience inspired by the infamous 17th-century French duelist and performer who refused to live by society’s rules. Mature audiences (13+). Performances June 12–21 at Kress Contemporary in Ybor City. Tickets and info: TampaFringe.org 3473589682

events.title: GÜD Essence - GÜD Yoga w/ Neidara
events.description: GŪD Yoga offers a deeply grounding yoga session. Sessions are led by Neidara Mathies (SmokenYoga), who has been teaching for over 14 years. Mathies is known for cultivating a serene and inviting atmosphere. Her classes blend mindful movement with intentional breathwork. Yogis will flow through a specially curated playlist and leave feeling balanced, centered, and completely renewed. This event is BYOW (Bring Your Own Wellness) format, and yoga mats and water are provided. All class attendees will receive exclusive in-store discounts. 954.723.9350

events.title: Anna Lepeley at Greenlight Lounge
events.description: Disco Cat Comedy and Luv Her Events present a high-energy Pride comedy show at Greenlight Lounge, headlined by touring comic Dr. Anna Lepele 🌈 PRIDE COMEDY NIGHT at Greenlight Lounge 🌈 Thursday, June 12th | 8:00 PM Disco Cat Comedy is back with a Pride show at Greenlight Lounge, in collaboration with Luv Her Events—bringing you a night that’s fun, high-energy, and actually feels like Pride. Headlining is Dr. Anna Lepeley — Cuban-American, internationally touring comedian, author, weightlifting enthusiast, and proud Subaru owner. She’s opened for Bob the Drag Queen, Chris Kattan, Jonathan Van Ness, Zane Lamprey, and more. 508-816-8968

events.title: Special Guest DJ Encore at Lower Deck
events.address: 601 S Harbour Island Blvd Suite 110, Tampa
events.description: Water views, ice-cold drinks, and special guest DJ Encore spinning all night—there's no better place to be than Lower Deck. Grab your crew and catch the party! Friday June 12th, starting at 8:00pm Reserve VIP tables and couches here Learn more on our website www.lowerdecktampa.com 8132513130

events.title: Lisa & The All Terrain Band
events.description: Fantastic cover band playing a wide range of tunes to get you on the dance floor! 941-251-3930

events.title: All Your Friends - Indie Dance Party
events.description: Tampa Shows and Endoxa Booking brings All Your Friends - The Indie Party to Bradenton and Oscura for a night of Indie and Garage Rock nostalgia only the early 2000s can bring! 9412014950

events.title: RENT
events.description: La Vie Boheme! Jonathan Larson's iconic Pulitzer Prize-winning musical that shaped a generation of audiences and taught us all to measure our life in love. Set in the East Village of New York City, Rent is about falling in love, finding your voice and living for today. Winner of the Tony Award for Best Musical and the Pulitzer Prize for Drama, Rent has become a pop cultural phenomenon. with songs that rock and a story that resonates with audiences of all ages. 8132654000

events.title: BE Pride Bazaar!
events.description: Celebrate Pride with us at our outdoor market featuring local vendors and artists! Shop, connect, and support LGBTQ+ creators and businesses. Sign up for a Saturday class and enjoy a morning of yoga, conscious commerce, and good vibes. 727-490-9361

events.title: Pitch a Pup
events.description: Get ready, Tampa… it’s time to fall in LOVE Join us at Hotel Haya in Ybor City for a fun, feel-good morning where amazing rescue pups are ready to meet their forever families 📍 Hotel Haya – Ybor City 🗓 June 13th, 2026 ⏰ 10:00 AM – 12:00 PM General Admission: $5 Donation (Every dollar goes directly to saving lives!) Meet adoptable dogs Learn their stories Find your perfect match Support rescue efforts Bring your friends, your family, and your heart—because your new best friend might be waiting for you 💫 813-710-0755

events.title: Summer Kick-Off
events.description: Bring the kids, bring your pup, and come celebrate summer with us! We’ll have tons of activities, treats, and fun for everyone. 🎉 Event Highlights: 💦 Splash pad play for the kids and pups 🌊 Two water slides ✨ Face painting & hair sparkles 🍔 Local food vendors 🍦 Andy’s Frozen Custard 🐶 Pup cups for the dogs 🐾 Dog play areas 🎁 Special deals for current clients and new clients This is the perfect chance to enjoy a summer day with your family, meet other pet lovers in the community, and see what Bay Paws Trinity is all about! 727-607-7297

events.title: Brooksville Watermelon Festival
events.description: Get ready for the 6th Annual Brooksville Watermelon Festival 2026 Allllll things melon themed and dripping with summertime vibes! Featuring Batten Farm Family — bringing farm fresh, locally grown watermelons straight from the source… the true stars of the show! With over 200 vendors, this FREE, family and pet friendly event is packed with juicy fun, epic shopping, local flavor, and unforgettable moments for all ages. HUGE Kidszone & petting zoos! Contests all day & kids pageant.

events.title: Pints and Paws Dog Grooming
events.description: Bring your best friend out for a bath and brews! Ology Tampa has Puddle Paws Mobile Dog Grooming bringing their dog wash service to their brewery! Brushes, bathes and nail trims all available with "Yappy Hour" specials so you can sit back and have a cold one while your pup gets a bath! Later in the evening Smokin' Simmons Barbeque will start serving at 5PM! Come out for a fun day of barks, baths and brews! 8505088790

events.title: Plains, Trains, and Streetcars: How Tampa Bay Got Around Before, After, and Besides the Automobile
events.description: Learn about how trains, streetcars, and horseback rides got people around the area throughout the past century and what the future of transportation in our area may look like. Presented by Tomás Lautaro Monzón from the West Pasco Historical Society. Register online: tarponlibrary.org/history 7279434922

events.title: Christy's Thirsty Where's Waldo Beer Ride
events.description: Back by popular demand … our “Where’s Waldo” Beer Ride is making its return to St. Pete! Throw on your best Waldo gear and join us for a guided bike tour as we cruise through some of the best local breweries, where a hidden Waldo awaits at every stop. Be the first to find him and snag a free beer! 🍺 Expect cold drinks, great people, costume-worthy photo ops, and plenty of laughs along the way. Free Pizza, Complimentary beer at start, drink discounts, free parking, prizes, discounted bike rentals, fun! --- Who’s ready to go find Waldo?! 9192443472
